findings.title: Buttons must have discernible text
findings.actual_results:
URL: https://www.samcomf.com/help-support/

The <button> element is missing an accessible name (visible text, aria-label, aria-labelledby, or title).
- "button" in Form section
findings.recommendation:
1. Ensure every <button> has discernible text content.
2. For icon-based buttons, provide an accessible name using 'aria-label' or a 'visually-hidden' span.
3. Verify that the button's purpose is clear to screen reader users.
- Provide clear visible text for each <button> whenever possible.
- For icon-only buttons, include an in-button hidden text label (e.g., visually-hidden text).
- Ensure button name describes the action (e.g., "Close dialog", "Open menu").
- Reference: https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/button/

raw_nodes.failure_summary: Fix any of the following: Element does not have inner text that is visible to screen readers aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty Element has no title attribute Element does not have an implicit (wrapped) <label> Element does not have an explicit <label> Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none" or role="presentation"

findings.title: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
findings.actual_results:
URL: https://www.samcomf.com/help-support/

Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.25 (foreground color: #1a91f8, background color: #ffffff, font size: 9.0pt (12px), font weight: bold). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
- "VIEW ALL" in "All About Samco Flexi Cap Fund"
- "VIEW ALL" in "Distributor Related Queries"
- "VIEW ALL" in "KYC Related Queries"
- "VIEW ALL" in "Order and Transaction Related Queries"
- "VIEW ALL" in "SamcoMF Investor Dashboard Related Queries"


Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.84 (foreground color: #999999, background color: #ffffff, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
- "2 articles" in "KYC Related Queries"
- "5 articles" in "Order and Transaction Related Queries"
- "2 articles" in "SamcoMF Investor Dashboard Related Queries"


Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.84 (foreground color: #999999, background color: #ffffff, font size: 10.5pt (14px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
- "Copyright © 2021 Samco Asset Management Private Ltd. | All Rights Reserved" in Footer section
findings.incorrect_code:
View All View All
2 articles
View All
5 articles
View All View All
Copyright © 2021 Samco Asset Management Private Ltd. | All Rights Reserved
findings.recommendation:
1. Identify all text elements with low contrast against their background.
2. Adjust the foreground or background color to achieve a minimum contrast ratio of 4.5:1 for normal text and 3:1 for large text (18pt+ or 14pt+ bold).
3. Use a contrast checker tool to verify compliance across all states (hover, focus, active).
- Adjust text/background colors until contrast reaches at least 4.5:1 for normal text and 3:1 for large text.
- Re-check hover/focus/visited states of links and buttons to keep contrast compliant in all states.

findings.title: Page should contain a level-one heading
findings.wcag_name: Page should contain a level-one heading
findings.actual_results:
URL: https://www.samcomf.com/help-support/

Page must have a level-one heading
- "Home Learn & Invest with SamcoMF Support Blog Search financial planning and mutu" in Page section
findings.recommendation:
Page should contain a level-one heading
- Inspect all flagged elements and apply semantic HTML fix required by this rule.
- Validate the fix in keyboard and screen-reader flow.
- Run scan again to confirm violation is resolved.

findings.title: All page content should be contained by landmarks
findings.wcag_name: All page content should be contained by landmarks
findings.actual_results:
URL: https://www.samcomf.com/help-support/

Some page content is not contained by landmarks
- "Learn & Invest with" in Page section
- "SamcoMF Support Blog" in Page section
- "Search financial planning and mutual fund related content" in Page section
- "input" in Form section
- "#jarallax-container-0" in Page section
findings.incorrect_code:
Learn & Invest with

SamcoMF Support Blog

Search financial planning and mutual fund related content
findings.recommendation:
Ensure all significant page content is inside semantic landmarks.
- Wrap major content in semantic landmarks such as <main>, <header>, and <footer>.
- Ensure only one primary <main> landmark is present.
